title: GGUF LLM Model Spec
description: GGUF language model specification for text generation and inference.
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies a GGUF-format language model for text generation via the llama.cpp backend. This is the primary spec type for LLM inference on CPU or hybrid CPU/GPU hardware.

## When to use
Use this type when a cap explicitly targets the GGUF runtime. The default points to Mistral-7B-Instruct Q8_0, a well-tested general-purpose model. For Apple Silicon environments prefer `media:model-spec;mlx;textable;llm`.

## Notes
The query string parameters `include` and `exclude` filter which files to download from multi-file GGUF repositories. Quantization suffixes (Q4_K_M, Q8_0, etc.) in the `include` pattern select the quantization level.
